questions.text: What does 'As-Saffat' refer to in the first verse?
questions.answer: The angels who stand in ranks/rows for worship.

questions.text: What is the core declaration of Verse 4?
questions.answer: Indeed, your God is One.

questions.text: What is the 'lowest heaven' adorned with?
questions.answer: An adornment of stars.

questions.text: What is the 'Tree of Zaqqum'?
questions.answer: A tree that grows out of the bottom of the Hellfire, serving as food for the sinners; its fruits are like the heads of devils.

questions.text: What was the 'clear trial' Ibrahim (AS) faced regarding his son?
questions.answer: He saw in a dream that he was sacrificing his son (Isma'il).

questions.text: What was the son's response when Ibrahim (AS) told him about the dream?
questions.answer: 'O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allah wills, of the patient'.

questions.text: What did Allah replace the son with during the sacrifice?
questions.answer: A great sacrifice (a ram).

questions.text: Which Prophet is mentioned as being sent to a hundred thousand or more?
questions.answer: Prophet Yunus (AS).

questions.text: Why was Yunus (AS) swallowed by the fish?
questions.answer: He fled to the laden ship and lost the draw of lots, being cast into the sea while he was blameworthy.

questions.text: What saved Yunus (AS) from remaining in the belly of the fish until the Day of Resurrection?
questions.answer: The fact that he was 'of those who exalt Allah' (did Tasbih).

questions.text: What plant did Allah cause to grow over Yunus (AS) after he was cast onto the shore?
questions.answer: A gourd vine (Yaqtin).

questions.text: What did the people of Prophet Ilyas (Elias) worship?
questions.answer: An idol named Ba'l.

questions.text: What is the status of the 'chosen servants' (Mukhlaseen) in this Surah?
questions.answer: They are exempted from the punishment and will have a known provision in Paradise.

questions.text: How is the wine of Paradise described in Verses 45-47?
questions.answer: White, delicious to the drinkers, no bad effect (headache) in it, nor will they be intoxicated by it.

questions.text: What is the response to the pagans' claim that Allah has daughters?
questions.answer: It is a lie; they attribute to Allah what they hate for themselves (daughters) and claim the angels are female without being witnesses to their creation.

questions.text: Which Prophet is associated with the phrase 'Peace be upon Ilyas-in'?
questions.answer: Ilyas (Elias).

questions.text: What is the final word on Allah's victory in Verse 171-173?
questions.answer: The word has already preceded for His servants, the Messengers, that they would be the victorious and His host would be the overcomers.

questions.text: How does the Surah conclude in its glorification of Allah?
questions.answer: 'Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe. And peace be upon the messengers. And praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds'.

questions.text: Who were the two brothers mentioned as being given 'the clear Scripture'?
questions.answer: Musa and Harun.

questions.text: What happened to the people of Lut in this Surah's account?
questions.answer: Allah saved Lut and his family, except an old woman among those who remained behind, and destroyed the others.
